title: WpfHexEditor Solution Class Diagram State
description: Schema for .whscd twin files that persist the visual and filter state of solution-wide class diagrams stored next to the solution file (e.g. MySolution.whsln.whscd). Extends the .whcd concept for multi-project scope.

version.description: Schema version. 1 = initial solution diagram format.

solutionPath.description: Absolute path to the solution file (.whsln / .sln / .slnx) this diagram belongs to.

generatedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the diagram was generated.

offsetX.description: Horizontal pan offset of the canvas viewport in logical pixels.

offsetY.description: Vertical pan offset of the canvas viewport in logical pixels.

minimapVisible.description: Whether the minimap overlay is visible.

minimapCorner.description: Corner of the canvas where the minimap is docked.

selectedNodeId.description: ID of the node selected when the diagram was last saved. Null if no selection.

showSwimLanes.description: Whether the project swimlane background layer is visible. Default ON for solution diagrams.

snapToGrid.description: Whether nodes snap to a 20 px grid during drag.

splitLayout.description: Split direction when viewMode is Split.

splitColRatio.description: Fraction [0.1–0.9] of horizontal space allocated to the code pane in horizontal splits.

splitRowRatio.description: Fraction [0.1–0.9] of vertical space allocated to the code pane in vertical splits.

collapsedSections.description: Flat list of collapsed member-section entries in the form 'nodeId:SectionName'. SectionName is one of: Fields, Properties, Methods, Events.

projectGroups.description: Visual metadata for each project in the solution (swimlane color, collapse state, exclusion).

excludedProjects.description: Project file paths to hide from the diagram (matched case-insensitively).

excludedNamespaces.description: Namespace prefixes to hide from the diagram (matched case-insensitively).

showPrivateMembers.description: Whether private members are shown in each node card.

showInternalTypes.description: Whether internal (non-public) types are included in the diagram.

nodes.description: Per-node canvas positions, indexed by stable node ID.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the project file (.whproj / .csproj).

color.description: Swimlane fill color as a CSS hex string (e.g. #3A6EA5).

isCollapsed.description: Whether the project's swimlane is collapsed in the diagram.

isExcluded.description: Whether the project is completely excluded from the diagram view.

id.description: Stable identifier for the node (survives source edits; defaults to the type name).

x.description: Horizontal canvas coordinate of the node's top-left corner in logical pixels.

y.description: Vertical canvas coordinate of the node's top-left corner in logical pixels.

width.description: Node card width in logical pixels.

height.description: Custom node card height in logical pixels. 0 means auto (no override).
